textByHash.5f65b48de36e24530029e89fd76642d190487f57: Welcome to the Emir's Arena! What can I do for you?
textByHash.bfac1c9693b3f82fcd8a6359656e7a90c4a3a6b3: This is the Emir's Arena, recently renovated with his coin. Here, you can fight for glory and prestige in individual duels and tournaments.
textByHash.2b680a77ceabef60ab61940aacc9833c8a2ba8b0: The original building was excavated by the Varrock Museum a while ago. It dated back to the Second Age!
textByHash.fdb3128db0390c9f6cd10dd55eb1835518b2839b: When the archaeologists moved out, a group of warriors, headed by myself, bought the land and converted it to a set of arenas for duels. The best fighters from around the world would come here to fight!
textByHash.90c7320cbb7f1e701cf79954ce2113d3acef2c9d: More recently, the Emir of Al Kharid acquired the Arena and had it renovated to the state it's in now. He's kept me on to handle day-to-day running, though.
textByHash.5776dade57f6713080ebe16f14d43061402f45a7: Something about a rowdy group of match-fixers, so I heard. I think the guards would know more about it than I would.
textByHash.3b2ed66dada7a78890217d1fdac9c7dc6acfbe0f: You can participate in Duels and Tournaments. These may be ranked, if you want rewards and prestige, or unranked if you're just fighting your friends for fun.
textByHash.99a4d306c04dffbc31b6a1df4c4d273209ed02c4: Win or lose, you'll earn Reward Points for taking part in ranked Duels and Tournaments. You can trade your points here for supplies that might help in the Wilderness, or such places.
textByHash.7ac9d0b3ea7caa4b51124b47082d8658642e2d3e: Now, if you want to choose your opponents, you can have an unranked Duel or Tournament instead, just for the fun of beating them.
textByHash.3f435b77d37f364161fb3739f499c0d7bd98e4e0: Use the recruitment boards outside the hospital to set up your own unranked tournament, or to apply to an existing one.
textByHash.30c6d0aea71c730fff385cf7d510b2b3f7b9313b: For an unranked Duel, look around the Arena for someone you wish to fight, and challenge them...
textByHash.976b34f4a0056395b493d55677a2f7a16ec5a9a9: Every week, we'll rotate the active build, meaning you'll have access to a different set of stats and items. This week, the active build is Zerker.
textByHash.a6714500a0aa0fad8367e6c498c98a0d70447dee: Every week, we'll rotate the active build, meaning you'll have access to a different set of stats and items. This week, the active build is 1 Def Pure.
textByHash.d7e06dbfb2589f4b7e1b7f30046d18a23815b2ae: Every week, we'll rotate the active build, meaning you'll have access to a different set of stats and items. This week, the active build is Max.
textByHash.f3cbae75cdd868bf9c904f2b5fe5f853257783b0: Every week, we'll rotate the active build, meaning you'll have access to a different set of stats and items. This week, the active build is Med.
